basic_details.job_title: NMMC Specialist Doctor Recruitment 2026 – 39 Vacancies for Polyclinic Consultant Posts
basic_details.short_information: Navi Mumbai Municipal Corporation (NMMC), through its Integrated Health and Family Welfare Society (Ekatmik Arogya va Kutumb Kalyan Sосаyeti), has invited applications from qualified specialist doctors for 39 vacant Polyclinic consultant positions across 7 Urban Primary Health Centres (UPHCs) in Navi Mumbai. The recruitment is being conducted under the National Urban Health Mission (NUHM) and 15th Finance Commission guidelines on an honorarium/per visit basis. Eligible specialists must submit their applications in a sealed envelope to the NMMC Health Department headquarters between 09 June 202

application_fee.details: No application fee has been mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Age limit is not explicitly stated in the notification. Candidates are advised to contact NMMC Health Department at 27567261 / 27567355 for clarification.

qualification.details: Educational Qualification | MBBS is mandatory as the base qualification for all specialties. PG Degree or Diploma in the relevant specialty is required. Maharashtra Medical Council registration is mandatory and must be valid/renewed.

salary_details.details: Consultants are not appointed on a fixed monthly salary. Payment is strictly on a per-visit basis as fixed by the Government of Maharashtra under NUHM: | Per Visit Honorarium: Rs. 2,000 Per Patient Checking Charges: Rs. 100 per patient Payment will be made on a per-visit basis as per government-fixed rates. | Example: A Physician visiting once per week and seeing 10 patients earns ₹2,000 (visit fee) + ₹1,000 (10 × ₹100) = ₹3,000 per visit. Monthly income depends on number of visits and patients attended.

selection_process: Application Screening Verification of documents and qualifications
Final Selection Based on qualification, MMC registration validity, and experience
how_to_apply: The application process is entirely offline. Online applications are not accepted.
Step 1: Download or prepare Annexure A (Expression of Interest form) as specified in the notification. Fill in your name, specialty, preferred UPHC location, and expected visit day/time.
Step 2: Prepare a sealed envelope containing all of the following documents (all self-attested):
PG Degree or Diploma Certificate (relevant specialty)
Maharashtra Medical Council (MMC) Registration Certificate with current renewal
Step 3: Submit the sealed envelope in person at:
Health Department, Navi Mumbai Municipal Corporation Headquarters 3rd Floor, Sector 15A, Block No. 1, Palmbeach Junction, Belapur, Navi Mumbai – 400614
Step 4: Submission window is 09 June 2026 (10:00 AM) to 19 June 2026 (3:00 PM). Applications received outside this window or by post/courier will not be accepted.
Important: The Commissioner, NMMC reserves the right to accept or reject any application in full or in part without assigning any reason.
Health Department, Navi Mumbai Municipal Corporation Headquarters, 3rd Floor, Sector 15A, Block No. 1, Palmbeach Junction, Belapur, Navi Mumbai – 400614
important_instructions: This is a visiting consultant engagement and not a permanent government job. Applications must be submitted only in a sealed envelope. Applications received after the last date will not be accepted. The NMMC Commissioner reserves the right to accept or reject any application. Consultants must attend the allotted UPHC as per the assigned schedule.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for NMMC Specialist Consultant Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the sealed envelope application is 19 June 2026 by 3:00 PM.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in NMMC Polyclinic Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are 39 vacant specialist consultant positions across 7 specialties and 7 UPHCs in Navi Mumbai.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary for NMMC Polyclinic Consultants?
faq.answer: There is no fixed monthly salary. Payment is ₹2,000 per visit plus ₹100 per patient as checking charges, as fixed by the Government of Maharashtra under NUHM.

faq.question: Q4. Is MMC registration mandatory?
faq.answer: Yes. A valid and renewed Maharashtra Medical Council (MMC) registration is mandatory for all applicants.

faq.question: Q5. Can I apply online for NMMC Specialist Consultant posts?
faq.answer: No. Applications must be submitted offline in a sealed envelope to the NMMC Health Department headquarters in Belapur between 09–19 June 2026.

faq.question: Q6. Which UPHCs are covered under this recruitment?
faq.answer: Seven UPHCs - Ghansoli, Sector 48, Sanpada, Pavne, Koparkhairane, Kukshi, and Airoli — are covered under this Polyclinic specialist recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. Can a doctor apply for more than one specialty post?
faq.answer: Only doctors holding the relevant PG qualification for a specialty can apply for that post. A doctor with dual qualifications may clarify with NMMC at 27567261 before applying.
